summary: Iteration 19 - Mobile Auth Redirect Bug Fix Testing Complete. All 11 backend tests PASSED. Frontend testing verified login page with 'Continua con Google' button visible and web auth-callback working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: The mobile-redirect endpoint is well-implemented with proper HTML bridge page that reads session_id from hash fragment
Frontend login.tsx correctly detects mobile platform and redirects to backend bridge page
The auth-callback.tsx has mobile browser detection to redirect to app deep link
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile Google login fix verified. The /api/auth/mobile-redirect endpoint serves HTML bridge page that extracts session_id from URL hash and redirects to app deep link. Web login and auth-callback pages working correctly.

tests: GET /api/auth/mobile-redirect?scheme=amen returns HTML with amen:// deep link
HTML contains session_id extraction from hash fragment
HTML shows fallback message after 3 seconds if app doesn't open
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns 200 + user + session_token
GET /api/auth/me with valid session returns user info

web_login_page.description: Login page renders with 'Continua con Google' button visible, email/password fields, and 'Accedi' login button

web_auth_callback.description: Auth-callback page processes session_id from query params, shows error for invalid sessions, and redirects to login after timeout

web_login_flow.description: Email/password login redirects to main dashboard after successful authentication

mobile_redirect_html_details.scheme_parameter: Uses scheme query param, defaults to 'amen'
mobile_redirect_html_details.session_extraction: Reads session_id from window.location.hash using URLSearchParams and regex fallback
mobile_redirect_html_details.fallback_message: Shows 'Se l'app non si apre, torna all'app e riprova.' after 3 seconds
mobile_redirect_html_details.no_session_error: Shows 'Sessione non trovata. Torna all'app e riprova.' if no session_id in hash
